productDisplayName: Puma Men TX-3 Grey & Blue Sports Shoes
description: Introduced in 1987, the puma TX-3 is a classic running shoe that features a 3-density wedge. Its stylish design with suede, synthetic leather and fabric combination upper makes this a sporty casual footwear. This pair comes with a shoe bagUpperSuede, mesh, synthetic leather and fabric combination upperMildly padded tongue and collar for comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleThree-density wedge blown rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionExternal TPU heel counter with a metatarsal flex pad for enhanced shock absorptionShoe careWipe surface with a clean and damp cloth to remove dustClean the suede overlays with a suede brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
